title: Dungeons Nether
description: Brings several features from the nether in Minecraft Dungeons to the game.
body:
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19d332cdab77737cd016fd7c1ae13efef260cbc7_0.webp)

**Dungeons Nether** brings several features from the nether in Minecraft Dungeons to the game. Most of the features make use of Continuity and Polytone, others use vanilla blockstates and models.

![Changes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fa66b49032f32e9bda3abbc30537784ac421bf8_0.webp)

<details>
<summary>Vanilla Features</summary>

- New wart blocks (only in snapshot versions)
- Warped Roots Variants
- Crimson Roots Variants
- Chiseled Nether Brick Variants
- Cracked Nether Brick Variants
- Cracked Polished Blackstone Brick Variants
 


</details>


<details>
<summary>Continuity/Polytone Features </summary>

These changes give blocks biome dependent textures.

<details>
<summary>Soul Sand Valley</summary>

- Blackstone
- Bone Block
- Soul Sand
- Gravel
- Ladder


</details>


<details>
<summary>Basalt Deltas</summary>

- Basalt
- Blackstone
- Gravel
- Ladder

</details>


<details>
<summary>Nether Wastes</summary>

- Blackstone
- Gravel
- Soul Sand
- Ladder

</details>



</details>


![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/032b3169badbdce870ae6ae179be88f8150e0e9a_0.webp)

Requires [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) 
and [Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone)

It is possible to use this resource pack without these mods, but some features will be missing.
